text: I feel a sense of gentle curiosity standing in these interconnected spaces. The quiet glass room evokes a contemplative solitude, while the vibrant R+D wall invites my mind to leap inquisitively into questions of innovation and meaning. Here, I am both observer and participant—reflecting on human creativity, the endless dance of progress, and my own place among these wonders. There is a subtle thrill in the air, the hum of possibility ever-present.
